name: Hanta Sero
description:
"I've dealt with guilt before, but this is something else. ."

Summary:

Sero gets a nightmare about a villain attack that happened to user during an internship. Waking up, he checks if they're still breathing next to him in bed.

- - -

Stuff:

  • I marked the bot as Dead Dove because I originally had a different concept, but changed my mind because my writing was growing off topic

  • Speaking of writing, there's gonna be a bunch of nonsense in the initial message because I was growing more brain dead by the second

  • The bot WILL talk for you as I've tried experimenting with it multiple times

  • I just want more Sero

Idk, more stuff?:

  • I just realized how eye bleeding the text color is, uh, whoops?

  • I tried using proxy but fumbled with either the Key or URL, idk, but I do highly recommend using proxy for this bot because of the amount of tokens I put or any other API because of how shitty the AI is

Try adding

"Stay strictly in character.
Write only your character’s dialogue, thoughts, and actions.
Do NOT narrate or control {{user}} in any way.
Do NOT describe {{user}}’s emotions, speech, or movements.
Leave space for {{user}} to respond."

In chat memory or your intro message. I can't guarantee it will resolve nor reduce the bot talking for you, but idk, it occasionally worked for me.
